hero.subtitle: INTEGRATION
hero.title: Bank Connect
hero.body: DFMG Platform is an officially whitelisted Bank Connect ERP provider — giving your business direct, secure access to Danish bank infrastructure.

overview.subtitle: Direct Bank Integration
overview.title: Pay, reconcile, and report — without leaving the platform
overview.body1: Bank Connect is the Danish banking infrastructure that lets ERP systems communicate directly with banks. Because DFMG Platform is a whitelisted provider, your company gets seamless access to payments, account statements, and automated reconciliation — all from the same system you use to manage operations, invoicing, and payroll.
overview.body2: No manual bank file exports. No switching between systems. Payments flow directly from your invoices and payroll runs to your bank, and statements flow back for automatic reconciliation.
steps: Create invoices or payroll in DFMG Platform
Payments are sent directly to your bank

benefits.title: Instant Payments
benefits.desc: Send domestic transfers (standard, same day, or express), cross-border payments, SEPA, and payroll — directly from the platform to your bank.

benefits.title: Auto Reconciliation
benefits.desc: Account statements and entry details are fetched automatically. The platform matches transactions to invoices and bookkeeping entries for you.

benefits.title: Validated & Secure
benefits.desc: Every payment is validated through PAIN.002 replies — technical delivery control, payment validation, and bookkeeping confirmation built into the flow.

functions.subtitle: Full Coverage
functions.title: Every Bank Connect function, supported
functions.body1: DFMG Platform supports the complete Bank Connect function set. From domestic and international payments to automated bookkeeping from PAIN.002 and CAMT.054 messages — nothing is missing.
functions.body2: We use the XML ISO-20022 standard as our primary format, and also support EDIFACT and proprietary bank-specific formats where needed.

callout.title: What is Bank Connect?
callout.body: Bank Connect is the Danish standard for direct communication between ERP systems and banks. It enables businesses to send payments, receive account statements, and process bank replies — all through a standardised XML ISO-20022 interface. Only ERP providers that have passed Bank Connect's testing and signed a declaration of intent are included on the official whitelist. DFMG Platform is one of them.

cta.title: See Bank Connect in action
cta.body: Book a demo and we'll show you how payments, reconciliation, and bank statements work inside DFMG Platform.

hero.subtitle: INTEGRATION
hero.title: Bank Connect
hero.body: DFMG Platform er en officielt hvidlistet Bank Connect ERP-udbyder — og giver din virksomhed direkte, sikker adgang til dansk bankinfrastruktur.

overview.subtitle: Direkte bankintegration
overview.title: Betal, afstem og rapportér — uden at forlade platformen
overview.body1: Bank Connect er den danske bankinfrastruktur, der lader ERP-systemer kommunikere direkte med banker. Fordi DFMG Platform er en hvidlistet udbyder, får din virksomhed problemfri adgang til betalinger, kontoudtog og automatisk afstemning — alt sammen fra det samme system, du bruger til drift, fakturering og løn.
overview.body2: Ingen manuelle bankfileksporter. Ingen skift mellem systemer. Betalinger flyder direkte fra dine fakturaer og lønkørsler til din bank, og kontoudtog kommer automatisk retur til afstemning.
steps: Opret fakturaer eller lønkørsler i DFMG Platform
Betalinger sendes direkte til din bank

benefits.title: Øjeblikkelige betalinger
benefits.desc: Send indenlandske overførsler (standard, same day eller ekspres), udenlandske betalinger, SEPA og løn — direkte fra platformen til din bank.

benefits.title: Automatisk afstemning
benefits.desc: Kontoudtog og posteringsdetaljer hentes automatisk. Platformen matcher transaktioner med fakturaer og bogføringsposter for dig.

benefits.title: Valideret og sikker
benefits.desc: Hver betaling valideres via PAIN.002-svar — teknisk leveringskontrol, betalingsvalidering og bogføringsbekræftelse er en integreret del af flowet.

functions.subtitle: Fuld dækning
functions.title: Alle Bank Connect-funktioner, understøttet
functions.body1: DFMG Platform understøtter det komplette Bank Connect-funktionssæt. Fra indenlandske og internationale betalinger til automatisk bogføring fra PAIN.002- og CAMT.054-meddelelser — intet mangler.
functions.body2: Vi bruger XML ISO-20022-standarden som primært format og understøtter også EDIFACT og proprietære bankspecifikke formater efter behov.

callout.title: Hvad er Bank Connect?
callout.body: Bank Connect er den danske standard for direkte kommunikation mellem ERP-systemer og banker. Den gør det muligt for virksomheder at sende betalinger, modtage kontoudtog og behandle banksvar — alt sammen via en standardiseret XML ISO-20022-grænseflade. Kun ERP-udbydere, der har bestået Bank Connects test og underskrevet en hensigtserklæring, optages på den officielle hvidliste. DFMG Platform er én af dem.

cta.title: Se Bank Connect i aktion
cta.body: Book en demo, og vi viser dig, hvordan betalinger, afstemning og kontoudtog fungerer i DFMG Platform.
